arts.ttl: Carsley dismisses club versus country issue
arts.sum: England interim manager Lee Carsley believes there are no issues when it comes to club and country.

arts.ttl: England's nine players in the firing line after furious Harry Kane criticism
arts.sum: An unprecedented total of nine players have withdrawn from the England squad ahead of games against Greece and the Republic of Ireland, with Three Lions skipper Harry Kane left fuming

arts.ttl: 'England before club' - Kane hits out after squad withdrawals
arts.sum: Harry Kane has revealed his disappointment with the number of withdrawals from the England squad this week, suggesting some England players have forgotten the importance of representing their country.

arts.ttl: Harry Kane gives decisive Thomas Tuchel verdict after 'surprise' at England decision
arts.sum: England captain Harry Kane will be reunited with his former Bayern Munich manager Thomas Tuchel at international level and has shared his thoughts on the new boss

arts.ttl: Harry Kane Calls Out Teammates After England National Team Withdrawals
arts.sum: England's captain, Harry Kane voiced his frustration over eight players dropping out of England's upcoming UEFA Nations League games.

arts.ttl: Harry Kane ‘pleasantly surprised’ by Thomas Tuchel appointment: ‘He brings a winning mentality’
arts.sum: Kane worked closely with the new England manager at Bayern Munich and believes he was the best candidate for the job

arts.ttl: England stars Cole Palmer and Kobbie Mainoo discuss fashion for GQ's Men of the Year
arts.sum: England stars Kobbie Mainoo and Cole Palmer discuss fashion, one of their main passions away from the pitch.

arts.ttl: Harry Kane criticises England withdrawals, insisting national team "comes before anything"
arts.sum: England captain Harry Kane expresses his disappointment at the number of players to have withdrawn from the latest Three Lions squad.

arts.ttl: Captain Kane unhappy at England squad withdrawals
arts.sum: Captain Harry Kane is unhappy with the number of players who have withdrawn from the latest England squad, insisting "England comes before club".

arts.ttl: England's Cole Palmer Details 'Frustrating' Euro 2024 Experience Under Gareth Southgate
arts.sum: Cole Palmer reflects on England's Euro 2024 campaign and the frustrations playing for Gareth Southgate.
